name: ViewChange
summary: Specifies type of change being made to a View.

enum_values.name: JumpCut
enum_values.summary: The current viewpoint jumps straight to the new viewpoint. Collision detection and gravity have no effect.

enum_values.name: Navigation
enum_values.summary: User is interactively navigating from current viewpoint to new viewpoint. Actual viewpoint set may be modified due to collision detection and gravity.
